verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Prince of Peace, Counselor Merciful, Son of God Lord of hosts, Conqueror Coming King, and Everliving God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I extol You, Lord, I extol You You are high above the earth, All creation shout Your worth I extol You, Lord, I extol You My Jehovah I extol You
